name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-46
title: Spec invariant 8 still asserts dual scripts that conflict with Inv 4 and contract
description: Spec Inv 8 says: 'orchestrator calls bug-status.py set ... closed' for bugs and 'backlog-item-status.py set ... implemented' for backlog. Inv 4 also references backlog-item-status.py. Both scripts no longer exist (unified into rabbit-file/scripts/item-status.py). Contract.md invokes lists backlog-item-status.py which is also stale. Spec Inv 8 also describes secondary close via item-status.py, so the unified script DOES handle the primary case too. Update Inv 4, Inv 8, and contract.md to reference item-status.py uniformly for both primary and secondary close, deleting the bug-status.py/backlog-item-status.py references.

history.note: Wave 4: auto_close uses item-status.py; state machine accepts test-green → spec-update for cycle restart.
